raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California has experienced a mental health crisis over the past decade, resulting in many individuals with mental illness becoming homeless.",
    "Senate Bill 1336 aims to convert unused buildings at Metropolitan State Hospital into a mental healthcare village.",
    "The proposed mental healthcare village will provide housing and treatment for individuals with mental illness.",
    "Metropolitan State Hospital specializes in psychiatric care and has the capacity to house 826 beds.",
    "Los Angeles County is seeking to renovate seven buildings at Metropolitan State Hospital to serve individuals with varying mental health and housing needs.",
    "The Los Angeles County Care Community will offer diverse treatment and housing options for people with mental health challenges.",
    "The project is intended to address the urgent public need for mental health services in the region.",
    "State and local governments are collaborating to identify and repurpose state-owned buildings for mental health treatment and housing."
  ]
}
```
